analysis_description: TTE from round3description (hist day 1/2/3 -> 8/7/6d mapped to CSV day 0/1/2). Implied vol via BS bisection on ATM-near voucher vs VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT mid; vega at that IV. Neighbor mid gaps m_i - m_{i+1} pooled stats and spread width in samples.
used_to_decide: Confirms IV is numerically stable on tapes; neighbor gaps have positive mean (decreasing mids with strike) with dispersion usable for z-score MR; vega scales with TTE.

analysis_description: Parameter sweep vs v0 (grid on one axis at a time in code): raised Z_THRESHOLD 1.8→2.35, ALPHA 0.02→0.03, smaller BASE_SIZE/MAX_PAIR, TRADE_EVERY=3, added day_idx from timestamp rollback for TTE_days=8-day_idx (per round3description CSV mapping), BS delta hedge on VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT. Backtest: v0 total -57,517 vs v1 total -7,850 (same prosperity4bt command, worse fills).
used_to_decide: v1 kept the same neighbor-gap thesis but reduced churn and directional bleed; day-aware TTE and delta hedge align greeks with spec timing; still underwater vs ~800k extract+VEV benchmark so further tuning needed.

analysis_description: Grid search (24 runs) around v1 with IV/greek-aware core unchanged: Z_THRESHOLD in {2.35,2.6,2.9}, TRADE_EVERY in {3,4}, BASE_SIZE in {8,10}, hedge_ratio in {1.0,0.6}. Used same worse-fill round-3 backtest command. Best totals clustered at Z=2.9; top = -908.
used_to_decide: Higher entry threshold is strongly beneficial for this neighbor-gap MR (reduces churn/slippage). Hedging at full delta modestly outperformed 0.6 ratio at the top settings. Promoted simplest tied winner (base_size=8) to trader_v2.
